citation: Tewodros Amdeberhan and Matthias Beck, Bergeron's Conjecture & A Tale of Two Binomial Coefficients, arXiv:2607.04050v1
source_statement: For 1<=a<b<c<d with ad=bc, [b+c choose b]_q-[a+d choose a]_q is coefficientwise nonnegative.
finite_scope: All quadruples with d<=60; exact recurrence, no q=1 substitution.
